name: Saltimbocca#1
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Veal scallopine (each piece about 5 inches square)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle veal slices with dried sage.
2. Cover each slice with a thin slice of prosciutto and trim the prosciutto to match the size of the meat piece (reserve trimmings for sauces).
3. Secure the prosciutto slices to the veal using toothpicks.
4. Heat butter in a large frying pan.
5. Add the meat in one layer and cook for 2 to 3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Transfer the meat, ham side up, onto a heated serving platter and remove the toothpicks.
8. Add white wine to the pan, scrape the brown bits from the bottom of the pan, and bring to a boil quickly.
9. Pour the sauce over the meat and serve immediately.
4-6 servings
